title: stelis floribunda
intro: Stelis floribunda, also known as the many-flowered stelis, is a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis floribunda include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Stelis floribunda are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to produce a tea that can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
